items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主要影响因素：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四个监控指标：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX指数（是否上升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→纳斯达克/标普500承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金价格更容易回撤；VIX指数上升→盘中更容易出现急剧波动/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据发布/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗口；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX指数上升→偏向纳斯达克/标普500先空后看、黄金价格偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX指数回落→偏向纳斯达克/标普500修复反弹、黄金价格喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Daily Spotlight: War Roils Oil Price Outlook…
- 宏观/Fed线索：Circle heads for it worst day on record as proposed law could limit stab…

items.summary: 国防部将Anthropic列为美国国家安全的风险，标志着第一家受此类评估的美国公司。
items.title_en: Pentagon ban of Anthropic faces judge; Claude AI maker seeks injunction
items.summary_en: The Defense Department designated Anthropic as a risk to U.S. national security, the first time an American company had been hit with that designation.

items.title: 亚马逊收购人机交互机器人制造商Fauna Robotics
items.summary: Fauna的第一款产品，名为Sprout，是一款价格为50,000美元的3.5英尺高的双足机器人，设计为“亲和和人性化”。
items.title_en: Amazon acquires 'approachable' humanoid maker Fauna Robotics
items.summary_en: Fauna's first product, called Sprout, is a $50,000 bipedal robot that's 3.5 feet tall and designed to be "approachable and human-friendly."

items.title: 软件股跌落，人工智能带来的威胁再次抬头

items.title_en: Software stocks fall as fear of AI disruption is back in full force
items.summary_en: Circle Internet Group, UiPath, HubSpot and SentinelOne were the four worst performers in the iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF on Tuesday.

items.title: 贾马尔·迪蒙警告称人工智能将导致大量失业，呼吁政府和企业联合提供激励措施。

items.summary_en: The potential AI-related disruption of the job market is a critical issue in Washington, with lawmakers trying to curb the amount of displacement.

items.title_en: Google partners with Agile Robots, growing its AI robotics footprint
items.summary_en: Google's DeepMind division has been partnering with more robotics companies in recent months.

items.title: Arm发布首款自主芯片，Meta成为首个客户
items.summary: Arm 正在开发自己的中央处理器（CPU），从仅向苹果、NVIDIA、亚马逊和谷歌等巨头许可其架构转变。CNBC独家首次看到了它。
items.title_en: Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer
items.summary_en: Arm is making its first CPU, pivoting from only licensing its architecture to giants like Apple, Nvidia, Amazon and Google. CNBC got an exclusive first look.

items.title: Anthropic称Claude现在可以使用您的电脑来完成任务以推动人工智能代理
items.summary: Anthropic及其竞争对手正试图提高AI代理的能力，之前今年的OpenClaw事件引发了广泛关注。
items.title_en: Anthropic says Claude can now use your computer to finish tasks for you in AI agent push
items.summary_en: Anthropic and its rivals are trying to ramp up capabilities of AI agents after OpenClaw went viral earlier this year.

items.title: Gap表示将在谷歌的Gemini中推出自助结算功能，这是时尚行业一家主要公司首次采用人工智能技术。
items.summary: 在专营零售领域竞争日益激烈的情况下，Gap与Gemini的合作以及其面向客户的AI工具为其带来了竞争优势。
items.title_en: Gap says it will launch checkout within Google's Gemini, in an AI first from a major fashion company
items.summary_en: Gap's partnership with Gemini and its customer-facing AI tools give it a competitive edge at a time when winning in specialty retail is harder than ever.

items.title: 亚马逊的Zoox计划今年晚些时候在奥斯汀和迈阿密推出无人出租车。

items.title_en: Amazon's Zoox to debut robotaxis in Austin, Miami later this year as it awaits paid ride approval
items.summary_en: It marks the latest expansion for Amazon's Zoox self-driving unit, which opened rides to the public in some parts of Las Vegas and San Francisco last year.

items.title: 环球环球 (Circle) 正面临着其历史上最差的一天，一个正在酝酿中的法律法案可能会限制稳定币的收益率。
items.summary: 稳定币如Circle的USDC等的收益率，通常以奖励的形式呈现，是用户持有这些币的关键动力。

items.summary_en: Earning yield, usually in the form of rewards, on stablecoins like Circle's USDC and others is key incentive for users to hold the coins.

items.title: 伊朗正在测试一种“选择性的”霍尔木兹海峡战略，这可能会再次给石油市场带来冲击。

items.summary_en: Iran appears to have adopted a “calibrated strategy” in the Strait of Hormuz — allowing only certain vessels to pass through the crucial waterway.

items.title: 特朗普称美国和伊朗“现在正在进行谈判”，伊朗“在谈论有理有据的东西”。

items.summary_en: "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated" to achieve President Donald Trump's military objectives, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

items.title: 美军 reportedly 计划部署 3,000 名士兵到中东地区，油价上涨近 5%
items.summary: 石油期货价格周二上涨近5%，全球价格收盘价超过104美元/桶，据报道，美国国防部计划部署一支空降部队到中东地区支持对伊朗的行动，这表明该地区局势即将加剧。
items.title_en: Pentagon reportedly plans to deploy 3,000 troops to the Middle East, lifting oil prices by nearly 5%
items.summary_en: Oil futures climbed by nearly 5% Tuesday, with global prices settling above $104 a barrel following a report that the Pentagon plans to deploy an airborne Army unit to the Middle East to support its operations against Iran — signaling that the situation in the region is poised to intensify.

items.title: 科威特称霍尔木兹海峡关闭将是灾难性的，会引发全球经济的连锁反应。

items.title_en: Kuwait says Strait of Hormuz closure is beyond catastrophic, will trigger domino effect across global economy
items.summary_en: Iran is holding the world economy hostage by blockading the Strait of Hormuz, said Sheikh Nawaf al-Sabah, the CEO of Kuwait Petroleum Corp.

items.title: 石油价格上涨，布伦特原油价格再次突破100美元，伊朗冲突缓和乐观情绪逐渐消退。

items.summary_en: Oil prices traded higher on Tuesday, with international benchmark Brent crude climbing back above $100 per barrel.

items.title: 巴基斯坦表示愿意促进美国和伊朗的战争谈判，特朗普和德黑兰给出了矛盾的信号。
items.summary: 特朗普称，美国和伊朗的谈判代表进行了“非常强烈”的谈判，但伊朗方面否认了这一说法。

items.summary_en: Trump said top U.S. negotiators and their Iranian counterparts have been engaged in "very, very strong talks," but Tehran has denied that claim.

items.summary_en: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.

items.title: 伊朗战争导致汽油和航空票价大幅上涨，立法者警告价格哄抬，但专家指出供应冲击是主要原因。
items.summary: 随着机票和汽油价格大幅上涨，某些立法者警告称可能存在价格哄抬的风险，尽管专家指出存在极端的供应冲击。
items.title_en: As Iran war causes gas and airfares to spike, lawmakers warn of price gouging — but experts point to supply shocks
items.summary_en: With airfares and gas prices spiking, some lawmakers are warning of the potential for price gouging, even as experts point to extreme supply shocks.

items.summary_en: Prediction market bettors aren't confident that the vital Middle Eastern oil passageway will reopen anytime soon.

items.summary: 英国此举是对伊朗战争的回应，冲突导致了油价历史上最大的一次供应中断。
items.title_en: Britain responds to Iran war energy shock by requiring solar panels and heat pumps in all new homes
items.summary_en: The move comes as part of Britain's response to the Iran war, with the conflict triggering the largest supply disruption in the history of the oil market.

items.title: 伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的袭击是“对每个国家的经济恐怖主义”，阿联酋石油CEO说。
items.summary: 阿联酋国有石油公司的首席执行官苏丹阿赫迈德·阿尔·贾伯说，霍尔木兹海峡必须重新开放以解决供应冲击。

以下五只股票值得关注：

1. NVIDIA (NVDA)：该公司的高性能计算和人工智能业务正在快速增长。
2. Micron Technology (MU)：该公司的内存和存储业务正在受益于云计算和人工智能的增长。
3. Shopify (SHOP)：该公司的电子商务平台正在受益于线上购物的增长。
4. Square (SQ)：该公司的数字支付和小商户服务业务正在快速增长。
5. DocuSign (DOCU)：该公司的数字签名和合同管理业务正在受益于远程工作和数字化转型的增长。
